info.title: UEY Premium Mobility API
info.description: Complete backend API documentation for UEY Premium Mobility ride-hailing platform.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all uploaded driver documents currently pending verification.

200.description: List of pending documents retrieved successfully.

post.description: Approves or rejects a driver onboarding document. Rejection requires a reason.

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: The ID of the driver document to verify.

200.description: Document has been approved or rejected successfully.

post.description: Authenticates a user using phone and password. Returns user profile details and access token.
Revokes the authenticated user's current Sanctum access token.
Requests a 6-digit password reset OTP code. Sends the code to the user's email.
Verifies the 6-digit OTP code and updates the user's password. Revokes all active tokens.

otp.description: The 6-digit OTP code received via email.

get.description: Returns the profile details of the authenticated Rider or Driver user.

put.description: Updates the profile information or notification settings for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account. Performs cleanup of related data.

password.description: The user's current password for confirmation.

post.description: Revokes the user's current Sanctum access token and issues a new one with the same role ability.
Registers a new driver user, creates driver profile, vehicle details, and wallet. Automatically logs them in, returning bearer token. Account is pending documents approval.

201.description: Driver registered successfully. Account is pending documents approval.

message.example: Driver registered successfully. Account is pending documents approval.

post.description: Registers a new rider user, creates an automatic wallet, logs them in and returns a bearer token.
Generates and sends a 6-digit OTP code to the user's phone number for login or registration.

200.description: OTP code generated and sent successfully.

post.description: Verifies the 6-digit OTP code sent to the user's phone number.
Uploads or re-uploads a driver onboarding document (driving_license, vehicle_registration, or insurance). Requires multipart/form-data payload.

get.description: Returns the overall driver status, vehicle approval status, bank account linking status, checklist requirements status, and list of uploaded documents.
Retrieves the linked bank account details for the authenticated driver.

404.description: Driver profile or bank account details not found.

post.description: Links a new bank account or updates the existing bank account for the authenticated driver.
Enables an active, verified driver to toggle their availability online or offline.

403.description: Only active approved drivers can go online.

message.example: Only active approved drivers can go online.

post.description: Updates the live location coordinates (latitude, longitude, bearing) for the authenticated driver. Synchronizes with Redis if the driver is online.

get.description: Retrieves driver dashboard details including profile summary, ratings, online status, and completed rides.
Retrieves the details of a ride. Only accessible by the assigned driver.

post.description: Transition the ride status from accepted to arriving. Accessible only to the assigned driver.
Transition the ride status from arriving to arrived. Sets the arrived_at timestamp. Accessible only to the assigned driver.
Transition the ride status from arrived to in_progress. Verifies the rider's 6-digit OTP. Sets started_at and otp_verified_at. Accessible only to the assigned driver.

otp.description: The 6-digit OTP provided by the rider.

post.description: Transition the ride status from in_progress to completed. Computes actual fare and stores actual trip metrics and fare breakdown. Accessible only to the assigned driver.

get.description: Retrieve a list of active, pending ride requests offered to the authenticated driver.

post.description: Accept a pending ride request. Assigns the driver and locks the ride to prevent race conditions.

422.description: Ride request is no longer available.

message.example: Ride request is no longer available.

post.description: Decline a pending ride request.

get.description: Retrieve the current active, non-completed, non-cancelled ride assigned to the authenticated driver.

post.description: Get fare estimates for all active vehicle types between pickup and destination.
Create a new ride request and find nearby drivers.
Cancel an active ride request. Allowed only before trip starts (statuses: pending, accepted, arriving, arrived).

get.description: Get details of a specific ride by ID.
Retrieve a list of past and active rides requested by the authenticated rider.
Get the current active (non-completed and non-cancelled) ride for the rider.

UnauthorizedResponse.description: Bearer token is missing, invalid, or expired.

ForbiddenResponse.description: The user does not have the required role or token abilities.

bearerAuth.description: Use Sanctum Bearer token for authorized requests (e.g. Bearer 1|...)
